title: Assistant Store Manager - Zara India Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Zara India Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Zara India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zara India Digital Technologies:
Zara India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
